prerequisites: A BaseSpace Sequence Hub account with API access.
A registered BaseSpace developer application (providing a client_id and client_secret) used to run the OAuth2 flow that issues the access token.
The domain name of your BaseSpace instance for the domain config field (for example euw2.sh.basespace.illumina.com).
Optionally, the user ID whose accessible data you want to limit results to; otherwise the user config field defaults to current.

authMethods.name: Access token (OAuth2)
authMethods.summary: Authentication uses the single access_token secret field. The token is issued through the BaseSpace OAuth v2 flow: the user authorizes a registered developer application, which exchanges an authorization code (web flow) or polls with a device_code (non-web flow) for an access_token. The token is then sent on API requests, and the scope requested (for example browse global) determines what data it can read.

setupSteps.title: Register a BaseSpace developer application
setupSteps.body: Create an application in BaseSpace and note the client_id and client_secret shown in the application management screen. These are required to authenticate the OAuth2 token exchange.

setupSteps.title: Obtain an access token via OAuth2
setupSteps.body: Run the BaseSpace OAuth v2 flow. For web apps the user is redirected to the authorization dialog and grants permission, returning an authorization code that is exchanged at https://api.basespace.illumina.com/v1pre3/oauthv2/token for an access_token. For non-web apps use the out-of-band device flow where the user visits a verification URI and the app polls the same token endpoint for approval. Request the scope you need (for example browse global) so the token can read your projects and runs.

setupSteps.title: Set the BaseSpace domain
setupSteps.body: Provide your BaseSpace instance domain in the domain config field, for example euw2.sh.basespace.illumina.com.

setupSteps.title: Set the user scope (optional)
setupSteps.body: Leave the user config field at its default value current to return all data accessible to the user associated with the access token, or supply a specific user ID to restrict returned data to what that user can access.

setupSteps.title: Enter the access token and connect
setupSteps.body: Paste the issued token into the access_token secret field, confirm the domain and user values, and save the source to verify the connection.

sources.title: BaseSpace Authentication and Getting User Information
